data.title: Unique Handmade Gifts | Personalised Gifts - Ingenious Gifts UK
data.metaDescription: Welcome to Ingenious Gifts, discover personalised handmade gifts and unique handmade gifts by creative and talented smile makers.
data.ogDescription: Welcome to Ingenious Gifts, discover personalised handmade gifts and unique handmade gifts by creative and talented smile makers.

issues.impact: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.
issues.fix: Trim to under 60 characters. Front-load your most important keywords.

issues.impact: Search engines use H1s to understand what your page is about. You're invisible.
issues.fix: Add exactly one H1 per page that clearly describes the page content

issues.impact: Invisible to screen readers and search engines. You're losing Google Images traffic.
issues.fix: Add descriptive alt text to every image. Be specific, include keywords where natural.

issues.impact: Slow load times = higher bounce rates. Mobile users are leaving before your page loads.
issues.fix: Compress images, minify CSS/JS, enable gzip compression. Target under 500KB.

summary: We analyzed ingeniousgifts.co.uk and found 4 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
